steps.title: Write the percent comparison
steps.content:
To find what percent $0.23x$ is of $x$, compare $0.23x$ to $x$ and multiply by $100\%$.
$$\frac{0.23x}{x}\cdot 100\%$$

steps.title: Simplify the expression
steps.content:
Since $x$ is positive, cancel $x$.
$$0.23\cdot 100\%=23\%$$
The answer is A.
